name: path-comparison
description: Path comparison must be byte-for-byte UTF-8 with no normalization or decoding

tests.description: Percent-encoding is NOT decoded - these are different paths
NFC vs NFD forms are different - no Unicode normalization
Ligature ﬁ (U+FB01) is NOT equal to fi - no compatibility normalization
Percent-encoded traversal is valid since it's NOT decoded (literal %2F bytes)

notes: Per spec Section 7.1: All path comparisons MUST be byte-for-byte on raw UTF-8 bytes. No percent-decoding, case folding, or OS-specific path normalization is permitted.
